---
title: "qPCR data processing"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-20"
---

```{r error= FALSE}
# load libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

```

Method Trial

```{r}
# read in data
qpcr.methods <- read.csv("data/processed/method trial.csv")
qpcr.methods <- qpcr.methods[-(17:28),]
qpcr.methods <- qpcr.methods %>%
  mutate(
    Ct_plot = ifelse(Final.Ct.Mean == "No amp.", 41, Final.Ct.Mean),
    Ct_plot = as.numeric(Ct_plot)
  )
qpcr.methods <- qpcr.methods %>%
  mutate(
    X..Oysters = factor(X..Oysters,
                        levels = c(0, 25, 50, 75)),
    Time.Period = factor(Time.Period,
                         levels = c(12, 24)),
    Gene = factor(Gene)
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(qpcr.methods,
       aes(x = X..Oysters,
           y = Ct_plot,
           color = Time.Period)) +
  geom_point(
              size = 3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 34, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.7)+
  facet_wrap(~ Gene) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = c(seq(15, 40, 5), 41),
    labels = c(seq(15, 40, 5), "No amp.")
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Oyster Quantity",
    y = "Ct Value",
    color = "Time Period (hrs)",
    title = "Expression of 12S and GAPDH in method trial"
  ) +
   theme(
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10))
```
